message:
test(core): add property-based tests for optimization proof gate

13 proptests covering golden artifact checksum validity after
creation/update/serde, ProofGateVerdict serde/pass-fail exclusivity,
self-check passing, counter consistency, pass_rate bounds, approve_drift
version bumping, reset preserving artifacts, and ProofSummary/
Snapshot/Degradation serde. (ft-2p9cb.5.4.3)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
